title: Refined CRISPR-Cas9 Process Schema
description: A comprehensive schema representing the CRISPR-Cas9 gene-editing process, including inputs, experimental settings, instruments, outputs, and advanced CRISPR variants. This schema integrates applications in SOX gene editing, stem cell research, cancer modeling, and regenerative medicine.

crisprCas9Process.description: Root object representing the entire CRISPR-based gene-editing or detection process.

inputs.description: Components and sequences required for the CRISPR-based editing or detection process.

guideRNA.description: The guide RNA (gRNA) or CRISPR RNA (crRNA) that directs the Cas nuclease to the target DNA or RNA sequence (5' to 3' direction).

sequence.description: The nucleotide spacer sequence of the gRNA/crRNA. Must be 20 nucleotides for standard Cas9, variable for other nucleases like Cas12a, Cas13a, and Cas14.

inSilicoDesigner.description: Tool used for designing the gRNA/crRNA sequence (e.g., CHOPCHOP, CRISPOR, Benchling, IDT).

designerDetails.description: Additional details about the in-silico designer if 'Other' is selected.

modifications.description: Chemical or structural modifications applied to the gRNA/crRNA to enhance stability or specificity.

modificationDetails.description: Additional details about gRNA/crRNA modifications if 'Other' is selected.

sgRNAStructure.description: Structural features of the sgRNA that influence Cas9 conformational dynamics and cleavage activity.

fullLength.description: Whether the sgRNA is full-length, which drives inward lobe closure of Cas9.

truncatedVariants.description: Details of any truncated sgRNA variants used (e.g., Δguide1-20, Δhairpins1-2).

variantName.description: Name of the truncated sgRNA variant (e.g., Δguide1-20).

sequence.description: Sequence of the truncated sgRNA variant.

crRNAType.description: Type of crRNA used, particularly relevant for Cas12, Cas13, and Cas14 systems (e.g., linear, circular).

crRNADetails.description: Additional details about the crRNA type if 'Other' is selected.

nucleaseSource.description: Source and properties of the CRISPR-associated nuclease (e.g., Cas9, Cas12a, Cas13a, Cas14).

type.description: Type of CRISPR nuclease used (e.g., Cas9, Cas12a, Cas13a, Cas14, BaseEditor, PrimeEditor).

typeDetails.description: Additional details about the nuclease type if 'Other' is selected.

organism.description: Source organism of the nuclease (e.g., Streptococcus pyogenes for SpCas9, Acidaminococcus sp. for AsCas12a).

organismDetails.description: Additional details about the organism if 'Other' is selected.

deliveryFormat.description: Format of the nuclease and gRNA delivery (e.g., plasmid DNA, mRNA, RNP).

deliveryFormatDetails.description: Additional details about the delivery format if 'Other' is selected.

engineeredVariant.description: Engineered variant of the nuclease (e.g., high-fidelity Cas9, dCas9, nCas9).

variantDetails.description: Additional details about the engineered variant if 'Other' is selected.

conformationalDynamics.description: Conformational dynamics of the nuclease domains, particularly relevant for Cas9 and Cas12a.

hnhDomainState.description: Conformational state of the HNH nuclease domain (e.g., activated, inactive, intermediate).

hnhDomainStateDetails.description: Additional details about the HNH domain conformational state if 'Other' is selected.

fretConstructs.description: Details of FRET constructs used to monitor conformational dynamics (e.g., Cas9hinge, Cas9HNH-1, Cas9HNH-2).

constructName.description: Name of the FRET construct (e.g., Cas9hinge, Cas9HNH-1).

labeledResidues.description: Residues labeled with FRET dyes (e.g., D435C/E945C for Cas9hinge).

ratioA.description: Observed (ratio)A value, which is proportional to FRET efficiency.

allostericCommunication.description: Whether allosteric communication between HNH and RuvC domains was observed.

linkerMutations.description: Details of mutations introduced in the HNH-RuvC linker region to study allosteric communication.

effectOnCleavage.description: Effect of the mutation on target and non-target strand cleavage.

transCleavageActivity.description: Whether the nuclease exhibits trans-cleavage activity (e.g., Cas12a, Cas13a, Cas14).

targetDNA.description: Target DNA sequence and Protospacer Adjacent Motif (PAM), if applicable.

referenceGenome.description: The specific genome build used to anchor coordinates (e.g., GRCh38, GRCm39).

referenceGenomeDetails.description: Additional details about the reference genome if 'Other' is selected.

genomicLocation.description: Genomic location of the target DNA (e.g., chromosome, position, gene name). Format: 'chrX:start-end'.

pamSequence.description: Protospacer Adjacent Motif (PAM) sequence required for nuclease binding (e.g., 'NGG' for SpCas9, 'TTTV' for Cas12a).

targetSequence.description: The nucleotide target sequence adjacent to the PAM (5' to 3' direction). Length depends on the nuclease type (e.g., 20 nt for Cas9, 23 nt for Cas12a).

strand.description: Strand of the DNA targeted by the gRNA (plus or minus).

predictedOffTargetSites.description: Computational predictions of potential off-target activity based on sequence homology and PAM availability.

genomicLocation.description: Genomic location of the predicted off-target site (e.g., 'chrX:start-end').

sequence.description: Sequence of the predicted off-target site.

mismatchPositions.description: Positions of mismatches relative to the target sequence (1-based indexing).

mismatchCount.description: Total number of mismatches between the gRNA and the off-target site.

pam.description: PAM sequence of the off-target site.

offTargetSites.description: List of potential off-target sites with mismatches relative to the target sequence.

genomicLocation.description: Genomic location of the off-target site (e.g., 'chrX:start-end').

mismatchPositions.description: Positions of mismatches relative to the target sequence (1-based indexing).

mismatchCount.description: Total number of mismatches between the gRNA and the off-target site.

pam.description: PAM sequence of the off-target site.

conformationalState.description: Conformational state of the nuclease domain when bound to this off-target site (e.g., activated, inactive, intermediate).

targetRNA.description: Target RNA sequence for Cas13-based detection systems, if applicable.

genomicLocation.description: Genomic location of the target RNA (e.g., virus, gene name).

targetSequence.description: The nucleotide target sequence for the crRNA (5' to 3' direction).

preSpacerFlankingSite.description: Pre-spacer flanking site (PFS) sequence required for Cas13 binding (e.g., 'A' for LwaCas13a).

donorTemplate.description: Donor template for Homology-Directed Repair (HDR) or base/prime editing, if applicable.

sequence.description: Sequence of the donor template (ssDNA, dsDNA, or plasmid).

type.description: Type of donor template (e.g., ssDNA, dsDNA, plasmid).

typeDetails.description: Additional details about the donor template type if 'Other' is selected.

homologyArmLength.description: Length of homology arms in base pairs (bp), if applicable.

modifications.description: Chemical or structural modifications applied to the donor template to enhance HDR efficiency.

modificationDetails.description: Additional details about donor template modifications if 'Other' is selected.

editingStrategy.description: Strategy used for gene editing or detection (e.g., knockout, knock-in, base editing, prime editing, SOX gene editing).

type.description: Type of editing or detection strategy employed.

typeDetails.description: Additional details about the editing or detection strategy if 'Other' is selected.

soxGeneTarget.description: Specific SOX gene targeted for editing (e.g., SOX2, SOX9, SOX17).

soxGeneTargetDetails.description: Additional details about the SOX gene target if 'Other' is selected.

baseEditorType.description: Type of base editor used (e.g., CBE, ABE, CGBE), if applicable.

baseEditorDetails.description: Additional details about the base editor if 'Other' is selected.

primeEditorType.description: Type of prime editor used (e.g., PE2, PE3, PEmax), if applicable.

primeEditorDetails.description: Additional details about the prime editor if 'Other' is selected.

pegRNA.description: Prime editing guide RNA (pegRNA) details, if applicable.

sequence.description: Sequence of the pegRNA, including spacer, reverse transcriptase template, and primer binding site.

spacerLength.description: Length of the spacer sequence in the pegRNA.

templateLength.description: Length of the reverse transcriptase template in the pegRNA.

pbsLength.description: Length of the primer binding site (PBS) in the pegRNA.

detectionTarget.description: Specific target for detection strategies (e.g., antibiotic resistance gene, antibiotic molecule).

detectionTargetDetails.description: Additional details about the detection target if 'Other' is selected.

signalAmplification.description: Method used for signal amplification in detection strategies (e.g., RPA, LAMP, HCR).

signalAmplificationDetails.description: Additional details about the signal amplification method if 'Other' is selected.

biosensingMethod.description: Biosensing method used for detection (e.g., fluorescence, colorimetric, electrochemical).

biosensingMethodDetails.description: Additional details about the biosensing method if 'Other' is selected.

deliveryExecution.description: Groups the physical execution, molecular format, timing, and biological host for the CRISPR-Cas9 process.

deliveryMethod.description: Integrated unit combining delivery method, specific instrument, and detailed protocol steps.

methodName.description: Delivery method (e.g., Electroporation, Lipofection, Viral Transduction) or assay type (e.g., in vitro detection).

methodDetails.description: Additional details about the delivery method or assay type if 'Other' is selected.

instrument.description: Specific hardware used for delivery or detection.

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the delivery or detection system (e.g., Thermo Fisher, Lonza, Bio-Rad).

model.description: Model of the delivery or detection system (e.g., Neon, Nucleofector, Lipofectamine).

protocol.description: Detailed steps and parameters for the selected delivery method or detection assay.

steps.description: Steps involved in the Electroporation protocol.

stepName.description: Name of the step (e.g., 'Cell Preparation', 'RNP Assembly', 'Pulse Application', 'Recovery').

parameters.description: Parameters specific to this step (e.g., voltage, pulse duration, cell density).

cellDensity.description: Density of cells per reaction (e.g., cells/mL).

buffer.description: Type of electroporation buffer used (e.g., P3, SE, SF).

steps.description: Steps involved in the Lipofection protocol.

parameters.description: Parameters specific to this step (e.g., reagent volume, incubation time).

reagent.description: Lipofection reagent used (e.g., Lipofectamine CRISPRMAX, RNAiMAX).

incubationTime.description: Incubation time for complex formation (in minutes).

cellConfluency.description: Percentage confluency of cells at the time of transfection.

steps.description: Steps involved in the Viral Transduction protocol.

stepName.description: Name of the step (e.g., 'Vector Selection', 'Viral Production', 'Concentration and Titration', 'Transduction', 'Selection').

parameters.description: Parameters specific to this step (e.g., viral vector, MOI, incubation time).

vector.description: Viral vector used (e.g., AAV, Lentivirus, Adenovirus).

enhancer.description: Enhancer used to increase transduction efficiency (e.g., polybrene, retronectin).

steps.description: Steps involved in the Peptide-Mediated Delivery protocol.

parameters.description: Parameters specific to this step (e.g., peptide type, concentration, incubation time).

peptideType.description: Type of peptide used (e.g., TAT, HA2, Nuclear Localization Signal).

steps.description: Steps involved in the Nanoparticle Delivery protocol.

parameters.description: Parameters specific to this step (e.g., nanoparticle type, concentration, incubation time).

nanoparticleType.description: Type of nanoparticle used (e.g., Lipid Nanoparticle, Gold Nanoparticle).

targetingLigand.description: Targeting ligand used to enhance specificity (e.g., antibody, peptide).

steps.description: Steps involved in the in vitro detection protocol.

stepName.description: Name of the step (e.g., 'Sample Preparation', 'RNP Assembly', 'Incubation', 'Signal Detection').

parameters.description: Parameters specific to this step (e.g., incubation time, temperature, buffer composition).

incubationTime.description: Incubation time for the reaction (in minutes).

temperature.description: Temperature at which the reaction is conducted (in °C).

buffer.description: Type of buffer used (e.g., HEPES, Tris-HCl).

reporterProbe.description: Type of reporter probe used for signal detection (e.g., fluorescent, colorimetric).

deliveryFormat.description: Format of the nuclease and gRNA delivery (e.g., plasmid DNA, mRNA, RNP).

casToGrna.description: Molar ratio of Cas nuclease to gRNA/crRNA (e.g., 1:1, 1:2).

donorToCas.description: Molar ratio of donor template to Cas nuclease (if applicable).

incubationTimes.description: Incubation times for various stages of the process.

rnPAssembly.description: Incubation time for RNP assembly (in minutes).

postTransfection.description: Time before assessing editing efficiency post-transfection (in hours).

recovery.description: Recovery time post-delivery before further processing (in hours).

detectionReaction.description: Incubation time for the detection reaction (in minutes).

cellType.description: Type and characteristics of the cells used in the experiment, if applicable.

type.description: Type of cells used (e.g., primary T cells, iPSCs, cell line, embryonic stem cells).

typeDetails.description: Additional details about the cell type if 'Other' is selected.

source.description: Source of the cells (e.g., donor, commercial cell line).

donorId.description: Identifier for the donor, if applicable.

cellLine.description: Name of the cell line, if applicable.

passageNumber.description: Passage number of the cells at the time of editing.

organism.description: Organism from which the cells are derived (e.g., human, mouse, axolotl).

organismDetails.description: Additional details about the organism if 'Other' is selected.

cultureConditions.description: Conditions under which the cells are cultured and expanded, if applicable.

medium.description: Type of culture medium used (e.g., RPMI, X-VIVO 15).

supplements.description: Supplements added to the culture medium (e.g., FBS, cytokines).

co2Concentration.description: CO2 concentration in the incubator (in percentage).

humidity.description: Humidity level in the incubator (in percentage).

experimentalSettings.description: Experimental parameters and protocols for delivering CRISPR components into cells or for in vitro detection assays.

fretExperiments.description: Details of Förster Resonance Energy Transfer (FRET) experiments used to study nuclease conformational dynamics, if applicable.

experimentType.description: Type of FRET experiment conducted (e.g., intramolecular FRET, single-molecule FRET).

experimentDetails.description: Additional details about the FRET experiment if 'Other' is selected.

buffersUsed.description: Buffers used in the FRET experiments (e.g., reaction buffer with heparin).

temperature.description: Temperature at which FRET experiments were conducted (in °C).

dataAnalysis.description: Methods used for FRET data analysis.

software.description: Software used for FRET data analysis (e.g., FluorEssence, Prism).

methods.description: Methods used for calculating FRET efficiency (e.g., (ratio)A, donor fluorescence lifetime).

detectionAssay.description: Details of the detection assay used for SOX gene editing or other applications.

assayType.description: Type of detection assay (e.g., DETECTR, SHERLOCK, HOLMES, CaT-SMelor).

assayDetails.description: Additional details about the assay type if 'Other' is selected.

amplificationMethod.description: Method used for nucleic acid amplification, if applicable (e.g., RPA, LAMP, PCR).

amplificationDetails.description: Additional details about the amplification method if 'Other' is selected.

signalDetectionMethod.description: Method used for signal detection (e.g., fluorescence, colorimetric, electrochemical).

signalDetectionDetails.description: Additional details about the signal detection method if 'Other' is selected.

limitOfDetection.description: Limit of detection for the assay (e.g., '10 copies/µL', '1 pM').

sampleType.description: Type of sample used in the assay (e.g., clinical, environmental, food).

sampleTypeDetails.description: Additional details about the sample type if 'Other' is selected.

instruments.description: Instruments and equipment used in the CRISPR-based process, excluding delivery systems which are now part of experimentalSettings.

synthesiser.description: Oligonucleotide synthesiser for creating custom gRNAs, crRNAs, and donor templates.

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the synthesiser (e.g., IDT, Thermo Fisher).

validationSystem.description: Systems used for validating the results of the CRISPR editing or detection process.

sequencer.description: DNA/RNA sequencer used for confirming edits or detection results.

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the sequencer (e.g., Illumina, Oxford Nanopore, PacBio).

sequencingMethod.description: Sequencing method used (e.g., Sanger, NGS, Long-read).

flowCytometer.description: Flow cytometer used for sorting or analyzing edited cells (if applicable).

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the flow cytometer (e.g., BD Biosciences, Beckman Coulter).

microscope.description: Microscope used for imaging cells or detection results (if applicable).

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the microscope (e.g., Zeiss, Leica).

type.description: Type of microscope (e.g., Confocal, Fluorescence, Brightfield).

thermocycler.description: Thermocycler used for PCR amplification (if applicable).

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the thermocycler (e.g., Bio-Rad, Applied Biosystems).

fluorescenceSpectrometer.description: Fluorescence spectrometer used for FRET experiments or fluorescence-based detection assays.

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the fluorescence spectrometer (e.g., HORIBA Jobin Yvon).

settings.description: Settings used during FRET experiments or detection assays.

integrationTime.description: Integration time for fluorescence measurements (in seconds).

massSpectrometer.description: Mass spectrometer used for metal isotope labeling detection (e.g., ICPMS).

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the mass spectrometer (e.g., Thermo Fisher, Agilent).

type.description: Type of mass spectrometer (e.g., ICPMS, MALDI-TOF).

electrochemicalWorkstation.description: Electrochemical workstation used for electrochemical detection assays.

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the electrochemical workstation (e.g., CH Instruments, Metrohm).

outputs.description: Results and metrics from the CRISPR-based editing or detection process.

editingEfficiency.description: Percentage of cells successfully modified (0-100%), if applicable.

indelProfile.description: Breakdown of insertions and deletions (indels) generated, if applicable.

insertions.description: Percentage of insertions in the indel profile.

deletions.description: Percentage of deletions in the indel profile.

sizeDistribution.description: Distribution of indel sizes (e.g., 1 bp, 2 bp, etc.).

additionalProperties.description: Percentage of indels of a specific size.

details.description: Additional details about the indel profile.

onOffTargetRatio.description: Ratio and analysis of on-target to off-target edits, if applicable.

scoreType.description: Type of score used to quantify on-target/off-target activity (e.g., E-score, S-score, CFD score).

scoreDetails.description: Additional details about the score if 'Other' is selected.

offTargetSites.description: List of identified off-target sites with their locations and editing frequencies.

genomicLocation.description: Genomic location of the off-target site (e.g., 'chrX:start-end').

mismatches.description: Number of mismatches between the gRNA and the off-target site.

editingFrequency.description: Frequency of editing at the off-target site (0-100%).

hnhConformationalState.description: Conformational state of the HNH domain when bound to this off-target site (e.g., activated, inactive, intermediate).

genomicStability.description: Reports on large-scale structural variations resulting from the edit (e.g., translocations, large deletions), if applicable.

details.description: Additional details about genomic stability, including methods used for detection (e.g., karyotyping, PEM-seq).

biologicalFitnessReport.description: A unified unit reporting on the quality, health, and functionality of the living product post-edit, if applicable.

cellProliferation.description: Fold change in cell proliferation post-editing relative to control.

functionalAssays.description: Results of functional assays to evaluate the edited cells (e.g., cytokine production, cytotoxicity).

cytokineProduction.description: Levels of cytokines produced by edited cells (e.g., IFN-γ, IL-2).

additionalProperties.description: Concentration of the cytokine (in pg/mL or ng/mL).

cytotoxicity.description: Percentage of target cells killed by edited CAR-T cells (0-100%).

activationMarkers.description: Expression levels of activation markers (e.g., CD69, CD25).

additionalProperties.description: Percentage of cells expressing the marker.

medicalObjective.description: Combines the targeted disease and the intended therapeutic strategy, if applicable.

targetDisease.description: Disease targeted by the edited cells or detection assay (e.g., cancer, genetic disorder, bacterial infection, SOXopathies).

therapeuticPotential.description: Potential therapeutic applications of the edited cells or detection assay (e.g., CAR-T therapy, gene correction, regenerative medicine).

safetyConcerns.description: Potential safety concerns associated with the edited cells or detection assay (e.g., off-target effects, immunogenicity).

conformationalDynamicsResults.description: Results from FRET experiments and other assays studying nuclease conformational dynamics, if applicable.

hnhActivationThreshold.description: Threshold (ratio)A value or other metric indicating HNH domain activation.

offTargetCleavageCorrelation.description: Correlation between HNH conformational state and off-target cleavage activity.

allostericControlEvidence.description: Whether evidence of allosteric control between HNH and RuvC domains was observed.

detectionResults.description: Results from CRISPR-based detection assays for SOX gene editing or other applications.

targetDetected.description: Whether the target (e.g., SOX gene mutation, antibiotic resistance gene) was detected.

detectionSignal.description: Quantitative signal from the detection assay (e.g., fluorescence intensity, colorimetric absorbance).

concentration.description: Concentration of the target detected (e.g., '10 copies/µL', '1 nM').

sampleAnalysis.description: Analysis of multiple samples, if applicable.

targetDetected.description: Whether the target was detected in this sample.

detectionSignal.description: Quantitative signal from the detection assay for this sample.

concentration.description: Concentration of the target detected in this sample.

safetyAndSecurityDashboard.description: Groups all risk-related data, uniting bio-physical variations with analytical off-target assessments.

genomicStability.description: Reports on large-scale structural variations resulting from the edit (e.g., translocations, large deletions).

details.description: Additional details about genomic stability, including methods used for detection (e.g., karyotyping, PEM-seq).

offTargetAssessment.description: Methods and results of off-target assessment.

method.description: Method used for off-target assessment (e.g., GUIDE-seq, CIRCLE-seq, Digenome-seq).

methodDetails.description: Additional details about the off-target assessment method if 'Other' is selected.

hnhConformationalAnalysis.description: Analysis of HNH conformational states at off-target sites.

safetyAndEthics.description: Safety and ethical considerations related to the CRISPR-based process.

immunogenicity.description: Assessment of potential immunogenicity of the edited cells or detection assay.

method.description: Method used for immunogenicity assessment (e.g., HLA typing, T-cell response assay).

methodDetails.description: Additional details about the immunogenicity assessment method if 'Other' is selected.

ethicalConsiderations.description: Ethical considerations and approvals related to the CRISPR-based process.

institutionalReviewBoard.description: Whether the study was approved by an Institutional Review Board (IRB) or Ethics Committee.

approvalNumber.description: Approval number or identifier from the IRB or Ethics Committee.

informedConsent.description: Whether informed consent was obtained from donors or participants.

dataPrivacy.description: Whether data privacy and confidentiality measures were implemented.

notes.description: Additional notes or observations about the CRISPR-based process.
